'''Gray Four''' was a [[Callsign/Legends|call sign]] used by multiple [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] and [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]].

==History==
[[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] [[Eurrsk Thri'ag]] was the fourth member of [[Wraith Squadron|Gray Squadron]] prior to its adoption of its permanent designation, Wraith Squadron.<ref name="XWWS" />

Another Wraith would use the call sign Gray Four during the squadron's time posing as the crew of the [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]]-aligned [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] [[Ession Strike|''Night Caller'']], flying its complement of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighters]] as [[Gray Flight (New Republic)|Gray Flight]]. "Gray Four" was directed by [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] to target the communications systems of the [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]] ''[[Constrictor]]'' in a [[Battle of Talasea|battle]] over [[Talasea]].<ref name="XWWS" />

[[Syal Antilles]] was designated Gray Four when she piloted an [[Aleph-class starfighter]] during the [[Second Galactic Civil War]].

==Appearances==
